name: @transit/db
description: Turbo passthrough shim for the Python pipeline. uv owns the real toolchain (pyproject.toml + uv.lock); these scripts just let `turbo run test|check|lint` span the Python app. Humans/CI keep using `cd apps/db && uv run …` directly. No build task — turbo skips db for build.

scripts.check: uv run ruff check src tests
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check src tests
